title: Aurora Palm Pals, Wizard The Pig Soft Toy, 61242, 5 inches, Pink
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Pig cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves Pigs
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Palm Pals, Wizard The Pig Soft Toy Palm Pals Wizard Pig Soft Toy fits perfectly in the palm of the hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and squishy. His body is pink all over and he has a plump little belly. This little Pig has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone he meets. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or Christmas, everyone will fall in love with this adorable little Pig.
